title: Fresh Music Discs
description: A Minecraft resource pack that adds 3D music disc models!
body:
![Fresh Music Discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/910fc3527aafb4113924b1c57ca7d107bf289481.png)
[![Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/discord/1371956415479939173?style=for-the-badge&logo=Discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=728ADA)](https://discord.gg/YqKBQtWE9T) [![YouTube Channel Subscribers](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UCgbhEot28IcFLwTiArTJXeg?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&logoColor=white&label=Youtube&color=FF0034)](https://www.youtube.com/@swip) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1243252?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&label=curseforge&color=F16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-music-discs) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/qdNj7A1T?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=1CD96A)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-music-discs) [![GitHub followers](https://img.shields.io/github/followers/iamcyberia?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&label=Github)](https://github.com/iamcyberia)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/899c0e364c509449cd21d46c78cd5a7775ff9951.png) This resource pack transforms every music disc in the game into custom 3D models, making each one visually distinct and easier to identify. By default, the GUI, Item Frames and Ground models will remain 2D, making it compatible with other resource packs that change the sprites. But if you'd rather use the 3D version of those that's possible by using [RespackOpts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)!
![Images](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5deeb64ca6bb18c92e7f7549e80319edce898f0.png) ![All the Discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/161c4120573477543dd6a41c5ae8661a5ccfb1b5.png)
[![emberhost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab8a431924048c60b1386c9524ffab14d7be9c12.jpeg)](https://bit.ly/hq2897wdafu) This resourcepack is sponsored by [Ember Host](https://ember.host/). Click on the image above or use the code **"CYBER"** for a 10% discount on your first purchase! Choose [Ember Host](https://ember.host/) to host your Minecraft server and take advantage of their powerful AMD processors and go beyond with excellent prices!
![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6570fc1c8af37836ab6d9863e9b10a47862ff43.png)
Recommended Mods
Required Mods on 1.21.5 and below
![Upcoming Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8b6e383aea47901c3b3b0bc3cc4aed78bebacf7.png) Better HMI Animations for HMI 5.2 update
![Extra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af5cdff06b99e6c7ba21ae04072e98688dd2674b.png) Special thanks to [Braytonks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/braysworld), who's not only excellent at making stuff, but also in explaining how to! Special thanks to [Hellay](https://modrinth.com/user/Hellay ) for making sprites and textures for some of the items. Special thanks to [Weskerson](https://modrinth.com/user/weskerson) and [Dani](https://modrinth.com/user/tixork) for the core shaders! And [Cubert](https://modrinth.com/user/cubert1), [Pato](https://modrinth.com/user/patovskiz), and [Hellay](https://modrinth.com/user/Hellay) for being my friends :) Last but not least I'd like to thank all testers in my Discord who helped me so much with feedback and finding bugs!
